contexts:
["[Dream 1 — source: data/dream_entries.pdf, page: 6]
Dream 31 Date: 2024-02-03
I arrived at a small wooden house on a quiet residential street. I was in a car with two older women, though I
didn't know them well. It had been raining earlier, and the pavement was still wet. The sky was dim and heavy,
not quite night but close. We went inside to visit an elderly woman who lived there. The house felt tidy and
modest, with soft yellow lighting in the hallway. We were there to take care of something, though I wasn't
entirely sure what the errand was. There was a sense that we needed to leave soon and return somewhere else.
Everyone seemed slightly tense. I felt it especially from the woman who owned the house. She acted polite and
calm, but it seemed like she knew something wasn't right. No one said it out loud. We moved carefully through
the space, speaking quietly, as if trying not to disturb something unseen. Then the dream ended.

[Dream 2 — source: data/dream_entries.pdf, page: 3]
Dream 14 Date: 2023-07-22
I was in a library. It was very old, with wooden shelves going up to the ceiling and ladders on rails to reach the
upper sections. It was completely silent. I was looking for a speciﬁc book but I didn't know the title or the
author, only that I would recognise it when I saw it. I climbed one of the ladders and moved slowly along the
upper shelves, pulling out books and looking at their spines. The light in the library was warm and amber-
coloured, coming through tall windows. I found a book with a plain red cover and no title. I opened it. The
pages were blank. I put it back carefully and climbed down the stairs at the far end.
Dream 15 Date: 2023-08-08
I was in a house I used to rent years ago. It looked exactly the same. The same furniture, the same view from the
window. But when I looked out of the window, the view was wrong — it looked out onto open countryside
instead of the street I remembered. I went through the rooms slowly. Everything was in its place. On the kitchen
table there was a cup of tea, still warm, as if someone had just made it and stepped away. I sat down at the table.
I could hear the sounds of the house, pipes, doors, footsteps above, all familiar. I sat there for a long time
drinking the tea. I felt very settled and also aware that I no longer lived there.

[Dream 3 — source: data/dream_entries.pdf, page: 6]
Dream 29 Date: 2024-04-14
I was in a large cave with a vaulted ceiling. There was natural light coming from somewhere above. The ﬂoor of
the cave was mostly ﬂat and dry. A shallow stream of water ran along one wall. I was exploring slowly, moving
from one chamber to another. In one chamber the walls were covered in small smooth stones arranged into
patterns, spirals and concentric rings. Someone had done this deliberately and recently. I sat down in the middle
of the chamber and looked at the patterns for a long time. On my way back through the cave I crossed the
stream on a ﬂat stone that had been placed there as a makeshift bridge. The water was very clear and cold.
Dream 30 Date: 2024-04-30
I was at a conference or academic gathering. People stood in groups talking and there were tables with papers
and name badges. I had apparently presented something earlier and people kept congratulating me, though I had
no memory of what it had been about. I smiled and thanked them. The room was warm and slightly too loud. I
found a seat near the edge of the room and sat with a glass of water. A woman I didn't recognise sat beside me
and said she had found my talk very useful. I asked what part speciﬁcally. She said, the part about the house by
the water. I nodded as if I knew what she meant. Outside the tall windows behind her it had started to rain."]

I was in a forest at night. The trees were very tall and close together. I had a small torch but the beam didn't

[Dream 3 — source: data/dream_entries.pdf, page: 5]
Dream 23 Date: 2023-12-15
I was in a small stone chapel with wooden pews and high windows. It was winter outside and cold. A service of

and let them go past. When the chapel was empty I sat alone in the silence for a long time. A candle was still
burning at the front. The light through the high windows was very white and ﬂat. After a while an elderly man
came back in through the door to extinguish the candle. He nodded at me. I nodded back. Then I sat alone in the
dark.
Dream 24 Date: 2024-01-09
I was in a very tall building, looking for a speciﬁc ﬂoor. The lift worked but didn't have all the buttons I needed.
Each ﬂoor I arrived at looked similar — long corridors with identical doors, overhead lighting. I walked down
